backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for specific DTO classes to improve code clarity and maintainability.
Replace Lombok-annotated class with a Java record to leverage modern language features for immutable data carriers.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Removed @Data and @Builder annotations and converted the class to a public record with constructor parameters.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Replace Lombok-annotated class with Java record to leverage built-in immutability and reduce boilerplate.
Remove unused Lombok imports and annotations as the class is now a standard Java record.
Replace Lombok-annotated class with a Java record to leverage built-in immutability and reduce boilerplate.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Removed @Data and @Builder annotations and converted the class to a public record with constructor parameters.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Replace Lombok-annotated class with Java record to leverage built-in data carrier features.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Removed @Data/@Builder annotations and class fields, replacing them with a public record declaration containing the same components.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Replace wildcard import with explicit imports and remove unused repository import to improve code clarity.
Extract sales summary calculation logic into a private method to allow internal reuse without transaction proxy issues.
Replace Builder pattern with direct constructor calls for SalesSummaryDto, likely due to DTO refactoring to records or immutable classes.
Replace Builder pattern with direct constructor calls for InvestmentRoiDto.
Replace Builder pattern with direct constructor calls for FraudStatisticsDto.
Update getRevenueAnalytics to use the new internal calculation method to avoid transaction proxy issues.
Update code to use accessor methods (e.g., totalRevenue()) instead of getters (getTotalRevenue()), consistent with Java Records or modern DTOs.
Replace Builder pattern with direct constructor calls for RevenueAnalyticsDto.
Reorder import statements to group standard library, third-party, and project-specific imports logically.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Moved jakarta.servlet and lombok imports below springframework imports.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Add import for the new JwtPrincipal domain class used for authentication data extraction.
Update user information extraction to support both JwtPrincipal and Jwt types for broader authentication compatibility.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Added instanceof check for JwtPrincipal before falling back to Jwt for extracting userId and userName.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Update tenant ID extraction to support both JwtPrincipal and Jwt types for broader authentication compatibility.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Added instanceof check for JwtPrincipal before falling back to Jwt for extracting tenantId.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Update debug log message to reflect that tenant ID can now be extracted from Principal as well as JWT.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Changed log message from 'extracted from JWT token' to 'extracted from JWT token/principal'.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Remove empty line in Javadoc comment to adhere to stricter documentation formatting standards.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Removed blank line between method description and list of approaches in extractTenantId Javadoc.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Add import for JwtPrincipal class to enable its usage in the converter.
Replace Collectors.toList() with Stream.toList() to utilize the Java 16+ convenience method.
Instantiate JwtPrincipal from JWT and populate it with extracted roles.
Replace hardcoded role string literals with constants from a dedicated SecurityRoles class to improve maintainability and consistency.
Refactor validateAndGetShop to return the Optional result directly instead of assigning to a local variable first.
Update role checks to use new constant names (e.g., SHOP_MANAGER instead of MANAGER) reflecting a change in the role naming convention.
Reorder and clean up import statements, moving Lombok imports to the end and removing unused User import.
Extract the hardcoded page size value into a named constant to improve code maintainability and readability.
backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.human_impl: Added `private static final int DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 20;` and replaced the literal `20` in `@PageableDefault` with the constant.

backend/src/main/java/com/princely/shopm.general_idea: Add a location field to the Product entity to store product location information.
Add a metadata field using Hibernate's JSON type code to store flexible key-value pairs.
Add supplier_name column to store the name of the product supplier.
Add supplier_contact column to store contact information for the product supplier.
Add a dimensions field to store product dimension details.
Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports for Jakarta Persistence and Lombok annotations.
Update Lombok @ToString and @EqualsAndHashCode exclusions to reflect the new Tenant field and removed Users field.
